# HPD.ML.Clustering.ClusteringModelParameters

- Package: `HPD-ML-Clustering` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Clustering`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Clustering`
- Kind: `class`

Learned K-Means model: K centroids with precomputed norms. Distance computation uses: ||x - c||² = ||x||² - 2·dot(x, c) + ||c||²

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class ClusteringModelParameters : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearnedParameters
```

```csharp

```


Precomputed ||centroid[k]||² for each cluster.


Centroid coordinates. Row-major: centroids[k * Dimensionality + d].

